title: Add scout-side platform pointer (north-star.md + CLAUDE.md)
userStory: As anyone (human or agent) working in scout, I want scout's canonical docs to reference the platform plan so that I don't keep building on the soon-to-be-retired embedded-HTML model.
acceptanceCriteria: scout/docs/north-star.md gains a short section noting that scout's web delivery is moving to the shared app-platform (toolkit-built PWA behind the shared edge), with a link to brainbot/docs/app-platform.md
Invariant 5 (web-first) is amended to clarify the browser stays the interface but delivery moves from go:embed to a toolkit PWA — without contradicting the rest of north-star
CLAUDE.md 'Current state'/'What's next' is updated with a one-line pointer to the platform migration and the scout task set id
No existing architecture claims are deleted or contradicted beyond the delivery-mechanism note
[Verification] Re-read north-star.md and CLAUDE.md; a fresh reader learns the frontend is being re-homed and where the plan lives, with all links resolving
